title: An Investigational Study to Evaluate Experimental Medication BMS-986165 Compared to Placebo in Participants With Plaque Psoriasis (POETYK-PSO-3) in Mainland China, Taiwan, and South Korea

eligibility.text: Plaque psoriasis for at least 6 months
eligibility.justification: This criterion helps identify patients with a specific disease duration relevant to treatment efficacy.
Severity of the condition is likely linked to treatment response, making it a factor in determining effectiveness.

eligibility.text: Candidate for phototherapy or systemic therapy
eligibility.justification: This criterion indicates patients are suitable for specific treatments, which can be used to assess treatment effects.
While not directly related to safety or efficacy, this criterion might influence recruitment and data collection.
